_comment: Manual source registry for DriveSense drive-pack automation. Human-curated. NEVER commit the source PDFs themselves (see ../.gitignore: manuals/ is ignored). Each entry records a manual's identity, where it was retrieved, its approved sha256, the reproducible generator + gold set (if the source is automatable), and the last-known trust status of the pack it produces. A changed PDF (hash mismatch) creates a CANDIDATE, never an automatic trusted replacement. Field contract + lifecycle: docs/drive-commander/workflow-register-a-manual-source.md and registry.py.

manuals.manual_title: PowerFlex 525 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual
known_residuals: fault->param link recall gap: extractor did not link F100/F109 -> P053 (non-diagnostic-critical)
page 98 analog-output block (t088-t090) deferred: multi-column layout parses with bleed/duplicate; not diagnostic-critical, none in gold
related_parameters (e.g. C125->P045) not represented: ParameterCard schema has no such field; deferred to a runtime schema PR

approval.note: Automated grading ceiling is 'beta'. Promotion to 'trusted' requires a recorded human sign-off per docs/drive-commander/runbook-pr-b-acceptance.md.

manuals.manual_title: DURApulse GS10 Series AC Drive User Manual

approval.note: MANUAL-REVIEW-ONLY: the live durapulse_gs10 pack shipped via PR #2501 but has no reproducible extractor generator + gold set wired into this pipeline yet. Registered for identity + update tracking; not auto-generatable until a generator + gold are added. Set source_url + pdf_sha256 when the manual is curated locally.

manuals.manual_title: PowerFlex 40 Adjustable Frequency AC Drive User Manual

approval.note: Promoted to live as a manual-cited beta pack (Drive Commander AB-3). Manual-only waiver per docs/drive-commander/runbook-pr-b-acceptance.md; automated ceiling is 'beta', trusted requires bench data.
